select
distinct
from dbo.ops_order_update
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_order_update (id, orderid, order_item, order_type, range, s_ck_type, t_ck_type, s_package_type, t_package_type, s_delivery_date, t_delivery_date, s_address, t_address, reason, success, cre_time, creator, s_specialFlag, t_specialFlag, s_carried, t_carried, assModel) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{range,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sCkType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tCkType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sPackageType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tPackageType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{success,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sSpecialflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tSpecialflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sCarried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tCarried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assmodel,jdbcType=BIT})

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
